before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"h4xkf","text":"- Add 0.5 g/L sodium thioglycolate as an additional reducing agent.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"lgnud","text":"- Adjust pH to 6.8–7.2 with NaHCO₃.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"ecfij","text":"- Trypticase peptone: 2000 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ul8qb","text":"- Yeast extract: 2000 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"smbe3","text":"- Glucose: Added 5000 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":11,"length":5}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"mysu9","text":"- L-Cysteine HCl x H₂O: 500 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ii7jx","text":"- Na-acetate: 1000 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2t8wi","text":"- NaCl: 18010 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"t3ptt","text":"- Vitamin mix (biotin, B₁₂, etc.): Keep as-is (optional)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"0i247","text":"- Water: 1011 ml","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
